steps.title: Mark the appositive
steps.content: The phrase "the explosion of a massive star, which blasts large amounts of radiation, heavy elements, and debris into space" renames "supernova." It is an appositive that must be set off from the rest of the sentence.

steps.title: Match the dash pair
steps.content: A opens the appositive with a colon, and B opens it with a comma, but the sentence closes it with an em dash after "space." C creates a fragment. An opening em dash before the appositive matches the closing em dash. The answer is D.
